descriptionDestroy hostile ships and salvage as much as you can, about 50 pieces of Metal Scrap should be a good start. Lieutenant Kreiger promised to get us a good deal on metal junk.
value50
minLvl0
completeDescriptionLieutenant Kreiger: “I managed to negotiate a special deal on the junk, if you go to the Antor Federation Smelting Plant you’ll get at least twice the normal rate.“

availableYes
